retained_observations.retained_reason: Finality-sensitive Make ordering needs a focused static guard; this task only adds archive-readiness basis and release authority readback planning.
retained_observations.next_action: Add a Make static regression that flags tracked report refreshes after finality verification unless fixed-point and finality are rerun.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when the static guard or release planner test rejects stale post-finality writer orderings.

retained_observations.retained_reason: The gap depends on full-vault active external-report inputs and report-contract summary reuse; public source must not infer private report currentness.
retained_observations.next_action: Add a focused currentness reuse regression after the external-report lifecycle refresh lane is next touched in full-vault context.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when report-contract reuse includes active external-report manifest/action-matrix input drift or an equivalent preflight.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Active report and generated-index records now expose digest/count basis, but archived originals still require a dedicated private archive reconciliation lane.
retained_observations.next_action: Extend archive reconciliation for archived reports with digest, matched/unresolved counts, unmatched count, and operator-only rationale without copying report prose.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when archived report decisions have schema-backed per-report basis or operator-only rationale.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Dependency install index portability is a separate dev-install contract change, not required for archive-readiness basis.
retained_observations.next_action: Split local dev-install index selection from canonical uv lock index policy and add a focused static test.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when dev-install has an explicit local index policy with tests and docs.

retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when full-vault review bundle mtime normalization is checked or explicitly declared operator-only.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Live branch protection and required-check drift cannot be proven from static public repository files.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Status currentness visibility is a focused status-surface change separate from archive-readiness basis.
